brief: Athenian philosopher; theory of Forms and the cave allegory
significance: PKD's idealism and concept of hidden reality draws heavily on Platonic Forms

brief: 3rd century Neoplatonist; the One and emanation theory
significance: Major influence on PKD's metaphysics of emanation and return to the One

brief: Pre-Socratic philosopher of flux and logos
significance: PKD frequently invokes Heraclitus on change and the hidden logos
PKD engages with the Parmenidean One as counterpoint to Heraclitean flux

brief: Pre-Socratic philosopher of love and strife
significance: Referenced in PKD's discussions of cosmic forces in tension

brief: Philosopher-mystic; mathematics and transmigration of souls
significance: PKD references Pythagorean ideas about hidden mathematical order
Referenced in PKD's critique of false conceptions of the divine

brief: Philosopher of substance and form; Plato's student
significance: PKD engages with Aristotelian categories when discussing substance and form

brief: God of wine and ecstasy; dying and rising deity
significance: PKD connects Dionysos to the dying-and-rising god pattern

brief: God of light and prophecy; Delphic oracle
significance: Referenced in PKD's discussions of prophecy and illumination

brief: Messenger god; guide of souls; patron of hermeneutics
significance: PKD engages with Hermetic tradition and the role of the divine messenger

brief: God of healing; son of Apollo
significance: PKD identifies Asklepios as a healing guide figure in his visions

brief: Orphic Dionysos; torn apart and reborn
significance: PKD references Zagreus in discussions of the dismembered god reassembled

brief: Goddess of wisdom and craft; born from Zeus's head
significance: Referenced in PKD's discussions of divine wisdom and strategy
